headline: Oil Prices Soar To $112, Tesla Tumbles To 7-Month Lows: What's Moving Markets Thursday?
summary: WTI crude surged 11.9% to $112 — on track for the highest daily closing since 2022. The VIX jumped 5.7% to 25.94
